ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the facility */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the facility */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the facility (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meters" (
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meter */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the meter is installed */,
  "meter_type" TEXT /* Type of the meter (e.g., electricity, gas, water) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the meter */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the meter was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the meter was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency (in days) at which the meter needs calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meters_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity, vibration) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency (in days) at which the sensor needs calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meter or sensor that took the reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that took the reading (if applicable) */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time when the reading was taken */,
  "watts" REAL /* Energy consumption in watts */,
  "volts" REAL /* Voltage in volts */,
  "amps" REAL /* Current in amps */,
  "pf" REAL /* Power factor */,
  "reading_status" TEXT /* Status of the reading (e.g., valid, flagged, discarded) */,
  "sensor_reading" REAL /* Actual sensor reading value */,
  "meter_reading" REAL /* Actual meter reading value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES meters ("meter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marks" (
  "mark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mark */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading associated with the mark */,
  "mark_name" TEXT /* Name of the mark */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mark */,
  "marked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the reading */,
  "mark_reason" TEXT /* Reason for marking the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marks_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marks_marked_by FOREIGN KEY ("marked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., energy manager, facility administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (device and browser) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high energy usage, sensor malfunction) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Time when the configuration was last modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who modified the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
